description_long: This kiosk features a wooden platform base with multiple shelves displaying various pottery and ceramic vessels, such as vases, cups, and plates. The structure is supported by a black metal frame and is topped with a prominent red sloped awning that provides shade and shelter. Two brass lanterns hang from the front corners, adding a decorative and functional touch. The rear of the kiosk is enclosed with a black panel, while the sides are open, allowing easy access to the displayed items. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for street vending or market use. The materials and arrangement suggest a rustic, traditional style with a focus on handcrafted goods.
description: A compact wooden kiosk with a red sloped awning, black metal frame, and shelves displaying pottery and ceramics. Brass lanterns hang at the front, and the rear is enclosed with a black panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red awning, shelves filled with pottery, and brass lanterns on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the kiosk, the sloped awning, and the arrangement of pottery along the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black panel that encloses the back of the kiosk, with no visible items or entry points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open structure, pottery arrangement, and the overhanging red awning.
attribute_roof_design: Sloped red awning made of fabric with overhangs on all sides.
